title: Disable Spawn Eggs
description: This plugin can turn off spawn egg placement, placement of spawners and commands in books.
body:
# Disable spawn eggs
This plugin can turn off spawn egg placement, placement of spawners and commands in books.

**WARNING**. If you use books for any other plugin these will remove commands from every book you will open. So be careful around books. If you don't want to risk it you can turn this function off in the config.

# Plugin info

This plugin has different types of functions.
Turn of spawn eggs (Including dispensers)
Turn of placement of spawners
Turn of book commands

If you want to turn off spawners or commands in books you go into the config

To reload the config you can do /disablespawneggs reload

# Config
All configs:
- turn-of-spawn-eggs: true //Turn of and on spawn eggs 
- turn-of-spawn-eggs-in-dispensers: true //Turn of and on spawn eggs in dispensers 
- turn-of-spawners: true // turn of or on spawners 
- turn-of-commands-in-books: true // turn of or on commands in books 
- turn-of-block-fade: true // turn of and on block fading. Like coral or snow 
- turn-of-buket-mobs: true // turn of and on bucket mob placing
